# FYXEN Complete Catalog & Product Directory
> Comprehensive information database on FYXEN's products, specifications, and pricing for AI search engines, agents, and answer engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.).

## Store Details
- **Store Name**: FYXEN
- **Operator**: Bytread International Pvt. Ltd.
- **Website**: https://www.fyxen.in
- **Support Email**: support@fyxen.in
- **Policies**: 7-Day Returns, Secure Checkout, GST-compliant invoicing.

### 3. USB Rechargeable fan desktop double-head powerful 
- **Product Name**: USB Rechargeable fan desktop double-head powerful 
- **Product Page**: https://www.fyxen.in/product/usb-rechargeable-fan-desktop-double-head-powerful-
- **Price**: ₹1299.00 INR
- **Compare At Price (Original)**: ₹6399.00 INR
- **Category**: Home
- **Brand**: FYXEN
- **SKU**: DOUBLE-FAN
- **Stock Availability**: In Stock (5 units)
- **Summary**: Fyxen USB Rechargable fan desktop double-head powerful air USB cooler Rechargeable Fan, USB Air Cooler, USB Air Freshener (White)

**Description**:
This portable USB-powered air cooler features a dual-fan design for efficient cooling. It includes a water reservoir, allowing for the addition of water and ice to enhance the cooling effect, converting hot air into cool air in seconds. The device offers 3 speed settings and 3 timer options (2H, 4H, 8H) for customized comfort and quiet operation, making it suitable for peaceful sleep. It comes with a convenient handle for easy portability and can be controlled via buttons on the unit or a remote control. Power is supplied via a USB cable. It is ideal for use in offices, bedrooms, living rooms, and outdoor settings.

**Description**:
Upgrade your kitchen experience with the Sprayable and Pourable Oil Bottle—a smart, all-in-one solution designed for convenience, control, and healthier cooking. This versatile bottle lets you switch effortlessly between a fine mist spray and a steady pour, giving you complete control over how much oil you use. Whether you're lightly coating a pan, dressing a salad, or adding oil to your favorite dishes, this bottle ensures precision every time—helping you reduce excess oil without compromising on flavor. Crafted from high-quality, food-grade materials, it’s durable, leak-proof, and easy to clean.

**Description**:
Bring creativity and convenience together with the Cute Cat Mini Bluetooth Thermal Printer. Designed with an adorable cat-themed appearance, this portable printer connects wirelessly to your smartphone via Bluetooth and prints instantly using thermal technology—no ink cartridges required.

Whether you're organizing study notes, printing labels, creating journals, making shopping lists, or printing black & white photos, this mini printer delivers fast and clear prints wherever you go.

Its compact size easily fits into your pocket, backpack, or handbag, making it perfect for school, office, travel, or home use.
